query:
SELECT id, section, entity, status, progress, current_stage, records_synced, triggered_by,
  DATE_FORMAT(started_at, '%H:%i:%s') AS started
FROM sync_logs
WHERE section IN ('Boonphone', 'boonphone')
ORDER BY started_at DESC
LIMIT 5;
